nasb.text: and Nahor lived one hundred and nineteen years after he became the father of Terah, and he had other sons and daughters.

esv.text: And Nahor lived after he fathered Terah 119 years and had other sons and daughters.

cnv.text: 拿鶴生他拉以後，又活了一百一十九年，並且生了其他的兒女。

ccb.text: 之后又活了一百一十九年，生儿育女。

csbs.text: 拿鹤生了塔勒之后，又活了一百一十九年，并且生了其他的儿女。
